AAPL.reasoning: AAPL is mid-range with no confirmed breakout. Range boundaries: support at $255.45 (21 tests, daily pivot low) and resistance at $276.11 (11 tests, daily pivot high). Current price ~$271 sits in the middle of this ~$20.66 range — not at a breakout point. Volume is the critical disqualifier: daily relative volume is 0.73x the 20-day average (29.8M vs 40.8M avg), and hourly relative volume is an even weaker 0.32x — far short of the required 1.5x confirmation. No breakout can be validated without volume. Bollinger Band width has expanded from the prior Bollinger squeeze noted in wiki (0.069 on Apr 15) to 0.0994 now, suggesting the squeeze has begun releasing. However, price has not yet reached the key resistance at $276.11 to trigger a measured-move setup. The hourly pivot resistance at $273.22 (27 tests, volume-confirmed) is the first hurdle; price closed below it on Apr 28 and Apr 29. Wiki context confirms the $270-282 zone was the identified 'break-above target' from prior runs, meaning price has entered this zone but has not decisively broken the upper boundary. ADX at 15.78 daily and 14.33 hourly both signal weak trend — coiling but not yet firing. MACD histogram is positive (0.607) and RSI divergence is bullish, which adds a slight upside lean, but breakout strategy requires a confirmed CLOSE above resistance with volume — neither condition is met today. Measured move if $276.11 breaks: 276.11 + 20.66 = $296.77 target. Setup to watch, not yet to enter.
